name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze the shredded potatoes dry in a clean towel.
2. Combine the potatoes, scallions, egg, flour, salt, white pepper, baking powder, and milk mix well.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium to moderate heat.
4. Drop the potato mixture by tablespoons into the hot oil.
5. Fry until lightly browned on both sides and no longer wet in the center.
6. Drain on a cooling rack and blot with paper towels.
7. Serve hot.
